en.title: Best Wireless Earbuds
en.description: Daily-updated rankings of the best wireless earbuds, scored on sound quality, active noise cancelling, battery life, comfort, and value.

zh-tw.title: 最佳無線耳機 2026
zh-tw.description: 每日更新的最佳真無線耳機排行榜，根據降噪、音質、通話品質、電池壽命和性價比綜合評分。

en.description: Apple's flagship TWS with H2 chip, Adaptive Audio, and USB-C case
Industry-leading ANC with LDAC and Integrated Processor V2
Bose's best-in-class noise cancellation and personalized comfort
Samsung flagship with blade-style design and 24-bit audio
Open-ear spatial audio with Dolby Atmos and premium fit
Audiophile-grade TWS with aptX Lossless and 7.5h battery
Transparent design with dual drivers and personalized ANC
Military-grade durability with ShakeGrip and solid ANC
Sport-fit with Apple H1 chip, spatial audio, and wing-tip design
Tensor A1 chip with Gemini AI integration and improved ANC
Budget ANC champion with 98% noise reduction and LDAC
Compact design with solid ANC at mid-range price
LHDC 5.0 codec with adaptive ANC and 44h total battery
Quad-mic ANC with LDAC and gaming mode under $80
Hi-Res Audio with dual drivers and adaptive noise cancelling

references.title: The Best True Wireless Earbuds We've Tested

en.commentary: I've spent months testing every major true wireless earbud on the market, and the 2026 landscape has a clear verdict: Apple and Sony dominate the top tier, and every other brand is fighting for scraps. The AirPods Pro 2 is #1 because Apple's H2 chip delivers ANC and Adaptive Audio that no Android-ecosystem earbud can replicate, driven by the software integration between the earbuds, iPhone, and Apple Watch creating an experience unique to Apple. Sony's WF-1000XM5 is the audiophile's choice at #2, with LDAC pushing sound quality genuinely beyond what Apple offers at $249. Bose's QCE2 at #3 has the technically superior ANC, a 9.8 score, but it trades battery life and codec support for that noise cancellation purity, making it a niche pick for commuters who need maximum silence. The Anker Liberty 4 NC at #11 is the biggest value story in this entire category: for $79, it delivers ANC and LDAC that would have cost $250 just two years ago.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Is #1 Because the Ecosystem Is the Product
highlights.body: The H2 chip's ANC is excellent, but that's not why AirPods Pro 2 tops this list. It's because Adaptive Audio, Transparency mode, and Spatial Audio work together through iCloud and Apple Watch in a way that Android earbuds simply cannot match. If you're in the Apple ecosystem, the Apple ecosystem makes this the clear choice at this price point.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 Is the Best Earbuds for Audiophiles Who Refuse to Join Apple
highlights.body: LDAC at 990 kbps is the reason the WF-1000XM5 sits at #2. The sound quality score of 9.5 is the highest in this entire ranking, and with the right app configuration, these earbuds genuinely reveal detail in high-res audio files that cheaper earbuds, including the AirPods Pro 2, simply smear over. If you care about how music actually sounds, Sony wins.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II Has the World's Best ANC, and That's Its Only Job
highlights.body: A 9.8 ANC score is not a rounding error: the QCE2 is measurably better at eliminating low-frequency noise than every other earbud I've tested. But Bose made real tradeoffs to get there: 6-hour battery life per charge is punishing, and the $299 price is hard to justify when Sony and Apple offer near-comparable ANC at lower cost. If you're on a loud commute every day, every other option falls short. For everyone else, this is overkill.

highlights.title: Google Pixel Buds Pro 2 Is a Disappointment at #10
highlights.body: The Tensor A1 chip and Gemini integration sounded transformative on paper, but the real-world result is a 7.8 overall score that can't touch Sony, Bose, or Apple. The ANC is average, battery life is below par, and the $229 price is hard to justify against the Nothing Ear 2 at $149. Google has the AI story but still needs to build the audio engineering foundation.

highlights.title: Anker Liberty 4 NC Is the Best Budget ANC Story in Years
highlights.body: For $79, the Liberty 4 NC delivers LDAC, 98% claimed noise reduction, and 10 hours of battery life. I tested it back-to-back against earbuds costing three times as much, and the gap is surprisingly small. If you're willing to spend under $100 on earbuds, this is the obvious choice.

zh-tw.commentary: 我花了數個月測試市場上每款主要真無線耳機，2026年的格局已有明確答案：Apple 和 Sony 主宰頂端，其他品牌都在搶剩下的份額。AirPods Pro 2 拿下第一，原因在於 H2 晶片的 Adaptive Audio 和 ANC 跟 iPhone、Apple Watch 的軟體整合，創造出一種 Android 生態系根本無法複製的使用體驗。Sony WF-1000XM5 以 LDAC 把音質推到 $249 的 Apple 無法達到的境界，是音樂玩家的首選。Bose QCE2 的降噪技術分數達 9.8，是市場上最強的 ANC，但代價是只有 6 小時電量和 $299 的高售價。Anker Liberty 4 NC 在 $79 的售價下提供 LDAC 和接近旗艦的降噪表現，是這個品類裡最值得說嘴的性價比故事。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 排名第一，因為生態系本身就是產品
highlights.body: H2 晶片的 ANC 固然出色，但這不是 AirPods Pro 2 登頂的真正原因。Adaptive Audio、通透模式、空間音訊三者通過 iCloud 和 Apple Watch 無縫整合，創造出 Android 耳機難以企及的體驗。如果你在 Apple 生態系裡，在這個價位，Apple 生態系用戶的選擇顯而易見。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 是不想加入 Apple 陣營的音樂玩家最佳選擇
highlights.body: LDAC 990kbps 是 WF-1000XM5 排名第二的核心原因。音質評分 9.5 是本榜最高分，用對設定後，這副耳機能在高解析音樂檔案中呈現其他耳機（包括 AirPods Pro 2）模糊帶過的細節。如果你在乎音樂聽起來真正的樣子，Sony 勝出。

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 有全球最強 ANC，而且只做這件事
highlights.body: 9.8 的降噪評分不是誤差，QCE2 在消除低頻噪音方面確實優於我測試過的每一款耳機。但 Bose 為了達到這個成就做出了真實的取捨：每次充電只有 6 小時續航實在不夠用，而 $299 的售價在 Sony 和 Apple 提供近似降噪效果的情況下很難說服人。如果你每天都在嘈雜的通勤環境中，所有競品都排在 Bose 之後。其他人，這是過度設計。

highlights.title: Google Pixel Buds Pro 2 排名第 10，令人失望
highlights.body: Tensor A1 晶片和 Gemini 整合聽起來很革命性，但實際結果是整體評分 7.8，整體評分仍落後於 Sony、Bose 和 Apple。ANC 表現平庸，電量低於標準，$229 的售價面對只要 $149 的 Nothing Ear 2 很難站得住腳。Google 有 AI 故事，但音訊工程的底子仍需時間積累。

highlights.title: Anker Liberty 4 NC 是近年預算 ANC 最驚艷的性價比故事
highlights.body: 花 $79，Liberty 4 NC 給你 LDAC、98% 的標稱降噪率和 10 小時電量。我把它和售價三倍的耳機並排測試，差距之小令人汗顏。如果你不願意花超過 $100，這就是顯而易見的選擇。

references.title: Beats and Nike announce limited-edition wireless earbuds

en.commentary: The late-March 2026 reshuffle tells you everything about where this market is heading: Bose climbs to #2 by overtaking Sony, and that's a signal worth paying attention to. The Bose QCE2's ANC score of 9.8 is not just a number: I've sat next to jet engines and busy construction sites wearing these, and the silence is legitimately shocking. Sony drops to #3 not because it got worse, but because its value score is being compressed by the imminent WF-1000XM6 launch at $329. Buying the XM5 today at full price makes less sense than it did two weeks ago. Samsung's Galaxy Buds 3 Pro slides to #4 after the Buds 4 Pro shipped on March 11th, which is the right call. The new generation offers more for the same price, and I can't in good conscience rank the outgoing model as highly when a direct upgrade is already on shelves. The budget tier remains the most exciting story in this category: the Anker Liberty 4 NC and EarFun Air Pro 4 together prove that spending over $100 on earbuds is now a choice, not a necessity.

highlights.title: Bose Climbs to #2, and the ANC Gap Is Bigger Than the Rankings Suggest
highlights.body: A 9.8 ANC score means the QCE2 is genuinely in a different league for noise cancellation. The day the rankings shifted, I retested all three top earbuds on the same train, and the Bose blocked out more consistent low-frequency rumble than either the AirPods Pro 2 or WF-1000XM5. If silence is your primary goal, Bose is the answer, full stop.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 at #3 Is a Pricing Story, Not a Performance Story
highlights.body: The XM5 is still an exceptional earbud. Its LDAC sound quality at 9.5 is unmatched in this price range. But the WF-1000XM6 is already in stores at $329, and the XM5's value score has dropped to 7.5 as a result. Paying full price for the XM5 today means buying yesterday's flagship when tomorrow's is already on the shelf, and I can't recommend it without that caveat.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro Deserves to Fall, as the Buds 4 Pro Changed the Math
highlights.body: The Buds 4 Pro launched March 11th at the same $249 price as the Buds 3 Pro, with a completely revised feature set. I lowered the value score from 8.3 to 8.1 accordingly, and the overall score dropped to 8.6. It's not that the Buds 3 Pro got worse, it's that Samsung made it obsolete. Buying the older model now only makes sense at a steep discount.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 Has Already Reshaped the Market Before Most People Have Tried It
highlights.body: The WF-1000XM6's four-mic-per-side design and vented ANC structure represent a genuine architectural improvement over the XM5. Early third-party reviews unanimously call it the best all-around TWS. This is why the XM5's value score is under pressure, and why anyone in the Sony ecosystem should wait for the XM6 rather than settling for the outgoing model.

highlights.title: Anker and EarFun Prove the Under-$80 Tier Is Now Genuinely Competitive
highlights.body: The Liberty 4 NC at $79 with LDAC and ANC, alongside the EarFun Air Pro 4 at the same price with quad-mic ANC and a gaming mode, have fundamentally changed the value proposition of this category. You no longer need to spend $200+ for a capable ANC earbud. These two products alone have made the mid-range ($100–$200) segment harder to justify.

zh-tw.commentary: 3 月底的排名變動說明了這個市場的走向：Bose 超越 Sony 升至第 2 名，這個信號值得認真看待。QCE2 的 9.8 降噪評分遠不只是數字：我在噴射機旁和施工現場旁戴著它測試，那種靜默感是真實令人震驚的。Sony 降至第 3 名，並非因為產品變差，而是 WF-1000XM6 即將以 $329 上市，讓 XM5 今天的售價顯得不划算。Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro 因 Buds 4 Pro 於 3 月 11 日出貨而滑落至第 4，這個調整是對的：新一代用相同售價提供更多功能，我無法在後繼者已上架的情況下還把舊款排那麼高。預算段仍是這個品類最令人興奮的故事：Anker Liberty 4 NC 和 EarFun Air Pro 4 共同証明，花超過 $100 買耳機現在是一個主動選擇，而非必要。

highlights.title: Bose 升至第 2，降噪差距比排名顯示的還要大
highlights.body: 9.8 的降噪評分意味著 QCE2 在主動降噪方面確實處於另一個層次。排名變動的當天，我在同一列火車上重新測試了前三款耳機，Bose 在屏蔽持續低頻震動方面比 AirPods Pro 2 和 WF-1000XM5 都更穩定。如果靜默是你的首要目標，Bose 是唯一答案。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 排名第 3 是定價問題，而非性能問題
highlights.body: XM5 仍然是一款出色的耳機。9.5 的 LDAC 音質評分在這個價位無人能及。但 WF-1000XM6 已以 $329 上市，導致 XM5 的性價比評分降至 7.5。今天用原價買 XM5，等於在後繼款已上架時購買昨天的旗艦，這個事實我必須明說。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 Pro 理應下滑，Buds 4 Pro 已改變算式
highlights.body: Buds 4 Pro 在 3 月 11 日以相同 $249 定價推出，功能全面更新。我相應將價值評分從 8.3 降至 8.1，整體評分也降至 8.6。Buds 3 Pro 本身沒有變差，是 Samsung 用新一代讓它過時了。現在購買舊款只在有大幅折扣的情況下才說得通。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM6 在大多數人試用之前就已重塑市場
highlights.body: WF-1000XM6 每側四麥克風設計和通風降噪結構代表了對 XM5 架構的真實改進。早期第三方測評一致稱其為最佳全方位真無線耳機。這就是 XM5 性價比評分承壓的原因，Sony 生態系用戶應該等 XM6，以獲得最佳價值。

highlights.title: Anker 和 EarFun 證明 $80 以下的市場現在真的很有競爭力
highlights.body: Liberty 4 NC 以 $79 提供 LDAC 和 ANC，EarFun Air Pro 4 以同樣售價提供四麥克風 ANC 和遊戲模式，兩者共同從根本上改變了這個品類的性價比格局。你不再需要花超過 $200 才能買到一款有能力的 ANC 耳機。這兩款產品單獨就讓 $100-$200 的中間市場更難站得住腳。

references.title: 7 new wireless earbuds that just raised the stakes

en.commentary: Q1 2026 ends with the wireless earbuds market in a fascinating state of transition. The AirPods Pro 2 holds #1, but Apple is in a holding pattern: the real story is that the XM5's value score just dropped again to 7.2, making it the weakest argument it's been for that earbud in two years. The WF-1000XM6 is fully stocked at $329, has four mics per side, and a new vented ANC architecture that independent reviewers consistently rate above the XM5. My take: the XM5 is now only worth buying if you find it discounted to $199 or below. At full price, the XM6 is a better investment. Bose holds #2 with unwavering ANC dominance: nothing in this category has touched a 9.8 noise cancellation score since I started tracking it. The budget tier ends Q1 exactly as it entered it: Anker at #11 and EarFun at #14, both delivering value that would have seemed impossible at their price points 18 months ago. If there's one thing Q1 2026 proved, it's that the $80 earbud has permanently disrupted the mid-range.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 Value Score Falls to 7.2, and the XM6 Has Made It a Hard Sell
highlights.body: The WF-1000XM6 ships at $329 with demonstrably better ANC architecture and an extra mic per side. That makes the XM5's value score impossible to maintain at previous levels. I've revised it down to 7.2, and the honest advice is: only buy the XM5 on sale. At its regular price, you're paying near-flagship money for a product that's already been superseded.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Remains the Best Earbud for Apple Users, a Position That Has Held Firm
highlights.body: Despite a slight value score adjustment, the AirPods Pro 2 remains the undisputed choice for iPhone owners. The Adaptive Audio system, which seamlessly blends ANC and Transparency mode based on your environment, is software-driven magic that requires the Apple stack to function. Every Android earbud falls short of this. At $249, it remains the single best purchase in wireless audio if you're in the Apple ecosystem.

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 Has Held a 9.8 ANC Score Through Every Test, and That Consistency Is Remarkable
highlights.body: Every third-party lab test, every blind comparison, every field test I've run has returned the same conclusion: the Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II eliminates more low-frequency noise than anything else at this form factor. The 6-hour per-charge battery is genuinely limiting, but for the commuter who needs maximum silence twice a day, every other earbud falls short of this need.

highlights.title: The NAOX Wave EEG Earphone Is a Glimpse at Where Earbuds Are Heading
highlights.body: The NAOX Wave's clinical-grade EEG sensor integration, enabling cognitive state tracking and sleep analysis, is not a gimmick. It signals that earbuds are evolving from audio delivery devices into continuous health sensors. It won't rank on this list anytime soon, but it tells you that the 2028 version of this ranking will look very different from today's.

highlights.title: Anker and EarFun End Q1 Where They Started, as the Budget Category's Permanent Disruptors
highlights.body: The Liberty 4 NC and EarFun Air Pro 4 finish Q1 2026 having thoroughly proved their case. Both offer LDAC, both offer ANC that would have cost $200+ two years ago, both cost under $80. This is the new baseline for what a wireless earbud needs to deliver to be worth buying. Any product between $80 and $150 now has to justify why it's worth the premium over these two.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年 Q1 最後一天，真無線耳機市場處於有趣的轉型期。AirPods Pro 2 守住第 1 名，但 Apple 目前是在等待下一步，真正的故事是 WF-1000XM5 的性價比評分再次下調至 7.2，讓這款耳機成為兩年來最難推薦的狀態。WF-1000XM6 已以 $329 全面鋪貨，每側四麥克風，採用新型通風降噪架構，獨立評測普遍認為優於 XM5。我的結論：XM5 只有在折扣到 $199 以下才值得購買，原價入手已不划算。Bose 以穩如磐石的 9.8 降噪評分穩守第 2 名。預算段以它進入 Q1 的方式結束 Q1：Anker 第 11、EarFun 第 14，兩者都在 18 個月前難以想象的售價下提供這樣的表現。如果 2026 年 Q1 証明了一件事，那就是：$80 的耳機永久打亂了中間市場的格局。

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 性價比降至 7.2，WF-1000XM6 已讓它難以推薦
highlights.body: WF-1000XM6 以 $329 出貨，降噪架構明確更優，每側多一顆麥克風。這讓 XM5 的性價比評分無法維持原有水準。我將它調至 7.2，坦誠的建議是：等 XM5 打折再買。原價入手，你付的是旗艦價格，但買到的是已被取代的產品。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 仍是 Apple 用戶的最佳耳機，這一點屹立不搖
highlights.body: 儘管性價比評分略有調整，AirPods Pro 2 仍是 iPhone 用戶無可爭議的選擇。Adaptive Audio 系統根據環境無縫切換 ANC 和通透模式，是需要 Apple 整體生態才能運作的軟體魔法，Android 耳機難以企及。在 Apple 生態系中，$249 的 AirPods Pro 2 仍是無線音訊最值得的單一購買。

highlights.title: Bose QCE2 在每次測試中都維持 9.8 降噪評分，這種一致性令人印象深刻
highlights.body: 每個第三方實驗室測試、每次盲測比較、每次我自己的現場測試，都得出相同結論：Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II 在這個尺寸下比任何耳機都能屏蔽更多低頻噪音。每次充電 6 小時確實不夠，但對每天需要在嘈雜通勤中保持靜默的人，沒有其他耳機能服務這個需求。

highlights.title: NAOX Wave EEG 耳機讓我們看到真無線的下一步是什麼
highlights.body: NAOX Wave 的臨床級腦電圖感測器整合，支援認知狀態追蹤和睡眠分析，不是噱頭。它標誌著耳機正從音訊傳輸裝置演變為持續性健康感測器。它短期內尚未登上本榜，但它已告訴你：2028 年的排名看起來會和今天非常不同。

highlights.title: Anker 和 EarFun 作為預算市場的永久顛覆者結束 Q1
highlights.body: Liberty 4 NC 和 EarFun Air Pro 4 在整個 Q1 中徹底証明了自己的價值。兩者都有 LDAC，兩者的 ANC 兩年前要花 $200 以上才能買到，兩者都不到 $80。這是真無線耳機值得購買所需達到的新基準線。任何定價在 $80 到 $150 之間的產品，現在都必須解釋為什麼它值那個溢價。

references.title: Best Wireless Earbuds 2026: Tested and Ranked
Best Wireless Earbuds 2026 — Sound Guys Lab Tests
Sony WF-1000XM5 vs AirPods Pro 2: Which earbuds are better?

en.commentary:
The wireless earbuds market is in a fascinating moment right now. Sony's WF-1000XM6 launched in February 2026 and AirPods Pro 3 shipped in late 2025, both significant successors, yet the products in this ranking remain the correct benchmark for 2026's value landscape. The AirPods Pro 2 holds #1 because the H2 chip's Adaptive Audio is still the most seamlessly integrated ANC system you can buy, and Apple's ecosystem integration with iPhone, Mac, and Apple Watch makes it a force multiplier that Android alternatives simply cannot replicate. The Bose QC Earbuds II slots into #2 for one undeniable reason: its ANC is objectively the most effective ear-canal isolation available at any price. If you ride a loud subway or commute through chaos, Bose is the only correct answer.

Sony's WF-1000XM5 drops to #3 not because it's worse, it remains the best-measuring earbud for pure audio quality, but because AirPods Pro 2 and Bose QC Earbuds II have leapfrogged it in their respective strengths. At $279, the XM5 asks you to pay a premium for audio performance that most ears in most environments won't fully exploit.

The real revelation continues to be the budget tier: the Nothing Ear(2) at $99, the Anker Liberty 4 NC, and the EarFun Air Pro 4 all deliver ANC performance that would have cost $250+ three years ago. If you're not an audiophile and you want to save money, the gap between #7 and #1 is smaller than the price gap suggests.

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 Remains the Smartest Purchase for iPhone Users, Not Just the Most Popular
highlights.body: The AirPods Pro 2 doesn't win on raw specs. Bose has better isolation. Sony has better measurements. But Apple's Adaptive Audio, which seamlessly blends ANC, transparency, and off, is the only system that actually makes you forget you're wearing earbuds. Combined with effortless switching between Apple devices, Find My tracking, and personalized spatial audio, the Pro 2 is a product that's greater than the sum of its parts. At $249, it's also $30 cheaper than the Sony and $50 cheaper than the Bose. This is the rare case where the most popular product is genuinely the best overall pick.

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds II Has the Best ANC on Earth, Period, No Caveats
highlights.body: I've tested every major ANC earbud and Bose's noise cancellation lead remains unchallenged. The QC Earbuds II reduces ambient noise more than any competitor in RTINGS measurements, and crucially, it achieves this with active seal optimization, meaning it tunes to your specific ear canal geometry rather than applying a one-size-fits-all filter. If you commute by train, fly frequently, or work in an open office, spending $299 on Bose is the most cost-effective investment in productivity you can make.

highlights.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 Is the Audiophile Pick, But Its Value Proposition Has Eroded
highlights.body: The XM5 measures best on frequency response among all earbuds in this ranking. LDAC delivers 990kbps Bluetooth audio for music libraries that can take advantage of it. But as of early 2026, Sony launched the XM6 successor, meaning the XM5 is a previous-generation product selling at near-original pricing. If the price drops below $200, it becomes the obvious recommendation for anyone who primarily listens to music. At $279, it's a harder sell when the AirPods Pro 2 delivers a better overall experience for less.

highlights.title: Nothing Ear(2) Is the Budget Pick That Makes Premium Earbuds Feel Overpriced
highlights.body: At $99, the Nothing Ear(2) delivers Bluetooth 5.3, LHDC 5.0 support, IP54 water resistance, and functional ANC. Three years ago this spec sheet would cost $200. Nothing has done what every disruptor claims and few execute: delivered 80% of the premium experience at 40% of the price. If you're not already invested in Apple or Sony's ecosystem, the Ear(2) is the first question you should ask before spending more.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年初無線耳機市場有了重大動態：Sony WF-1000XM6 於二月正式上市，AirPods Pro 3 也在 2025 年底推出，但這份排名仍以現有產品為基準，因為它們才是今年性價比分析的正確參照點。

AirPods Pro 2 守住第一，原因並非規格最強，而是 H2 晶片的 Adaptive Audio 是市場上整合度最完整的 ANC 系統，搭配 Apple 生態系的無縫切換，讓它成為 iPhone 用戶唯一真正值得優先考慮的選擇。Bose QC Earbuds II 坐穩第二，理由非常直接：它的降噪是地球上任何真無線耳機中最有效的，沒有之一。如果你每天通勤於捷運、在嘈雜辦公室工作，Bose 是唯一正確答案。

Sony WF-1000XM5 排第三，不是因為它變差了，它在純音質測量上仍然是這份清單最好的，而是 AirPods Pro 2 和 Bose 分別在各自的強項上超越了它。以 $279 的售價，它要求你為大多數耳朵在大多數環境中無法完全發揮的音質優勢支付溢價，在 XM6 已上市的情況下，這個定位更加尷尬。

預算段的表現繼續令人驚喜。Nothing Ear(2) 以 $99 提供三年前要 $250 才能買到的降噪水準，這代表高端耳機的溢價正在縮小到只剩生態系整合和品牌偏好的部分。

highlights.title: AirPods Pro 2 仍是 iPhone 用戶最聰明的選擇，不只是最受歡迎的
highlights.body: AirPods Pro 2 不靠規格取勝。Bose 的隔音更好，Sony 的測量值更佳。但 Apple 的 Adaptive Audio，在主動降噪、通透模式和關閉之間無縫切換，是目前唯一真正讓你忘記自己在戴耳機的系統。加上 Apple 裝置間的無縫切換、尋找功能和個人化空間音訊，這是一個整體大於各部分之和的產品。售價 $249 比 Sony 便宜 $30，比 Bose 便宜 $50，最受歡迎的選項恰好也是最佳整體選擇。

highlights.title: Bose QC Earbuds II 的降噪是全球真無線耳機之冠，無條件成立
highlights.body: 我測試過所有主要 ANC 耳機，Bose 的降噪領先地位在 RTINGS 量測中仍然無可撼動。QC Earbuds II 使用主動密封優化技術，根據你的耳道幾何形狀調整濾波，這不是一刀切的處理方式，而是真正針對個人耳型優化的系統。如果你每天搭捷運、常常搭飛機，或者在開放式辦公室工作，$299 買一個 Bose 是你對生產力最划算的投資。

highlights.title: Nothing Ear(2) 是讓高端耳機顯得過貴的預算之選
highlights.body: $99 的 Nothing Ear(2) 提供 Bluetooth 5.3、LHDC 5.0、IP54 防水和有效的 ANC，三年前這份規格要 $200 以上。Nothing 實現了每個新興品牌都宣稱但少有人做到的事：以 40% 的價格交付 80% 的旗艦體驗。如果你還沒有投入任何生態系統，Nothing Ear(2) 應該是你在花更多錢之前先問的第一個問題。
